summary.summary: Inside; a mild and comfortable temperature is anticipated. Outside; like a nice, warm day. Also, air moisture should feel ok and mostly calm with light air movement. Showers, clouds will occasionally block sunlight, and bright sunshine will dominate the day. Similar weather conditions should remain.
